title: Uruguayan Spicy Stir Fry
description: A quick and spicy Uruguayan-inspired stir fry made with tender beef, crunchy vegetables, and a hint of Uruguayan flavor.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced chorizo and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced bell peppers and chopped onion to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
In a small bowl, whisk together the stir-fry sauce and spicy sauce.
Pour the sauce into the skillet and stir to combine.
Season with pepper and salt to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro.
